title: Data Fetching Hook (useFetch)
description: Abstract API calls into a reusable hook.

slides.title: useFetch – Reusable Data Fetching 🌐
useFetch with Dependencies
slides.content: Sometimes you need to refetch when a parameter changes. The hook already does that if you include the parameter in the URL, or you can pass dependencies:

quizData.question: In the useFetch hook, returning a cleanup function that aborts the fetch prevents memory leaks and race conditions.
quizData.explanation: Yes, aborting the fetch if the component unmounts or the URL changes prevents setting state on an unmounted component and cancels the request.
